subject: Parse new model ids from operation policy
commit_message:
Parse new model ids from operation policy

Takes VFModule info from policy yaml,instead AAI.

Change-Id: If745b3ba32562cbc37571cea29ec7797ee697e88
Issue-ID: POLICY-1545
Signed-off-by: vamshi.nemalikonda <vn00480215@techmahindra.com>

Patch Set 3:

The VdnsControlLoopTest's are failing. For the successTest:

11:19:30.959 [main] INFO org.onap.policy.controlloop - ControlLoop-vDNS-6f37f56d-a87d-4b85-b6a9-cc953cf779b3: CL_vDNS.EVENT.MANAGER.OPERATION.LOCKED.GUARD_PERMITTED: event=org.onap.policy.controlloop.VirtualControlLoopEvent@31b82e0f manager=ControlLoopEventManager [closedLoopControlName=ControlLoop-vDNS-6f37f56d-a87d-4b85-b6a9-cc953cf779b3, requestId=666e6f4d-8960-49b7-ba58-15bb87b0a0f4, processor=org.onap.policy.controlloop.processor.ControlLoopProcessor@781711b7, onset=666e6f4d-8960-49b7-ba58-15bb87b0a0f4, numOnsets=1, numAbatements=0, isActivated=true, currentOperation=ControlLoopOperationManager [onset=666e6f4d-8960-49b7-ba58-15bb87b0a0f4, policy=unique-policy-id-1-scale-up, attempts=0, policyResult=null, currentOperation=null, operationHistory=[]], targetLock=VnfTargetLock [lockId=dbaf55ad-7764-49bd-b177-f20a24ad8a48, targetType=VNF, target=dfw1lb01lb01, requestId=666e6f4d-8960-49b7-ba58-15bb87b0a0f4]] operation=ControlLoopOperationManager [onset=666e6f4d-8960-49b7-ba58-15bb87b0a0f4, policy=unique-policy-id-1-scale-up, attempts=0, policyResult=null, currentOperation=null, operationHistory=[]] lock=VnfTargetLock [lockId=dbaf55ad-7764-49bd-b177-f20a24ad8a48, targetType=VNF, target=dfw1lb01lb01, requestId=666e6f4d-8960-49b7-ba58-15bb87b0a0f4]
11:19:30.961 [main] ERROR org.onap.policy.controlloop.actor.so.SoActorServiceProvider - Either base or non-base vf module is not found from AAI response.
11:19:30.961 [main] WARN org.onap.policy.controlloop - ControlLoop-vDNS-6f37f56d-a87d-4b85-b6a9-cc953cf779b3: CL_vDNS.EVENT.MANAGER.OPERATION.LOCKED.GUARD_PERMITTED: unexpected null operation request

So there is a problem in the code trying to find VF Modules.
Uploaded patch set 4.
